name: Desktop MCP
description: Desktop automation MCP for the AI agent: enumerate/inspect windows and UI-Automation element trees, per-window screenshots the vision model sees (PrintWindow, never steals focus), guarded write actions — invoke an element, set text, focus, move — AND destructive actions (close window, kill process) that require a LIVE HUMAN to physically confirm on a trusted window which rejects synthesized/injected input, so the agent can never self-approve. All gated by an exe-path scope allow-list + off-LLM host input consent, with UIA element-targeting (no synthetic mouse/keyboard), a TOCTOU re-check, a shell/terminal typing ban, and an append-only audit. Privacy redaction of sensitive apps. Ships its own AefosDesktopMcp.exe.
